subject: Compressed tiffs from SerialEM
body:
Dear Dimitry,

I try to process compressed tiff stacks from SerialEM (3.7 beta5) with Warp 
(unnormalized data packed as 4-bit in super-resolution). In our setup the 
gain should be rotated counterclockwise for the normalization. Even if I 
rotate the gain reference image accordingly, Warp complains that the image 
dimensions of gain and stack do not match. In our recent pipeline we use 
clip from Imod to unpack the tiff stack and motioncor2 treats them well 
subsequently. Eman2 reports a dimension of 3710 x 7676 for the original 
tiff stacks. After the clip command the dimension of the output is restored 
to 7420 x 7676.
I would be grateful if you could point out what I should do to make it run.
Thank you,
Gabor
